subcodes.first_line: O Son of Afnán! O thou who speaketh in My Name, who dwelleth nigh unto My presence, and who hast quaffed the wine of My utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن افنانی یا ایها الناطق باسمی و الساکن فی جواری و الشارب رحیق بیانی قد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
